name: pitch-enhanced
description: PPT-style presenter view preserving pitch's floating-card aesthetic. Adds TOC drawer navigation, transition effects (fade/push/zoom), presenter timer, and speaker notes. All 5 styles compatible. Cloned from pitch theme with full PPT feature set for easy rollback.

rendering.navigation: PPT footer bar — prev/next + transition mode selector (fade/push/zoom) + TOC drawer + script toggle + timer
rendering.progress_indicator: progress bar (footer) + slide counter + TOC highlight

content_rules.notes: Same content rules as pitch. Floating card leaves natural padding on all sides. Titles up to 28 chars (2 display lines OK). Max 4 bullets. Divider slides must have a compelling image. Punchline type supported for impactful closing statements.

partial_styles.name: visual-heavy
partial_styles.reason: visual-heavy full-bleed background-image on .slide is partially visible in floating-card layout (card clips overflow). Background gradient works fully.

recommended_structure.pattern: Cover → Speaker Intro → Agenda → [Divider → 3-5 Content] × N → Punchline → Contact
recommended_structure.notes: Same recommended structure as pitch, with added punchline type for impactful closing statements.

author: co-deck
